name: visual-feedback-bridge
description: Chrome extension for adding visual annotations to web pages and exporting them for Code Agents

scripts.dev: npm run build && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "vite build --watch --mode watch-main" "vite build --watch --config vite.content.config.ts --mode watch-content"
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run build:main && npm run build:content && npm run verify:build
